---
title: "R"
subtitle: "R posts, tutorials, and notes"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  include:
    categories: "R"
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, description, author]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

This page collects posts categorized as `R`.

The R-only RSS feed is [index-r.xml](index-r.xml).
